formatted_text:
Meeting Tasks

- Shreya: create the wireframes for the homepage, focusing on the hero section, navigation bar and footer
- Deepnanda: set up the base project with React and Tailwind CSS, including folder structure and pushing to GitHub
- Shawheli: design the logo, select the color palette and choose a font that aligns with clean, modern feel
- Unassigned: take care of the content side, starting with the homepage text, about section and features
